benchmark_details.name: Collu-Bench
benchmark_details.overview: Collu-Bench is a benchmark for predicting code hallucinations of large language models (LLMs) across code generation (CG) and automated program repair (APR) tasks, including 13,234 code hallucination instances collected from five datasets and 11 diverse LLMs.

purpose_and_intended_users.goal: To evaluate and analyze the prediction of code hallucinations in LLMs.
purpose_and_intended_users.limitations: Errors in the target hallucination token index due to reliance on an automated pipeline.

data.source: 13,234 code hallucination instances collected from five datasets and 11 diverse LLMs.

methodology.calculation: Accuracy is calculated based on the ratio of correctly predicted hallucination tokens.
methodology.interpretation: An accuracy of 33.15% indicates the current limits of prediction performance.
methodology.validation: Evaluated through experiments using different models.
